# César Ballardini — katra.ballardini.com.ar

<!-- Standard: https://llmstxt.org/ -->

> Personal blog and professional profile of César Ballardini — Senior Software Developer, System Architect, and Educator with 35+ years of experience in software development, infrastructure engineering, and university teaching. Bilingual site in Spanish (primary) and English.

The site covers professional consulting services, a full CV/résumé, technical skill keywords, and blog posts on software development, system administration, and programming paradigms.

César currently works as part of the development team at NewGrid, doing backend and frontend development on an analysis platform that power systems engineers use to identify grid reconfigurations — work that has contributed to over $100 million in annual customer savings in the U.S. Midwest.

## Professional Pages (English)

- [CV](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/cv/): Full curriculum vitae with experience, education, achievements, and skills
- [Consulting](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/consulting/): Consulting services offered — custom software, infrastructure automation, system integration, technical training
- [Skill Keywords](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/en/skills/): Categorized index of technical skills — programming, frontend, backend, databases, infrastructure, cloud, energy sector, teaching

## Páginas Profesionales (Español)

- [CV](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/cv/): Currículum vitae completo con experiencia, educación, logros y habilidades
- [Consultoría](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/consultoria/): Servicios de consultoría — desarrollo de software, automatización de infraestructura, integración de sistemas, capacitación técnica
- [Habilidades Técnicas](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/habilidades/): Índice categorizado de habilidades técnicas

## Blog (Español)

- [Blog](https://katra.ballardini.com.ar/): Artículos sobre desarrollo de software, administración de sistemas, y paradigmas de programación
